parsed.clarification_question: Which review do you want for this paragraph: (A) sentence/paragraph-level writing polish (R1.6), (B) argument/evidence check for logical consistency and evidence-claim alignment (R1.2+R1.3), (C) conceptual reframing of the thesis/contribution (R1.1), or (D) novelty and citation/scholarship assessment (R1.4+R1.7)?

rationale.RX.1: The request is underspecified, so we must explicitly note ambiguity and limits on the projected responsibilities.
rationale.RX.2: We should avoid presuming a specific editorial or analytical task until the user selects one of the options.
rationale.RX.3: The projection must remain a responsibility mapping only and not perform edits, critiques, or evaluations.
rationale.RX.4: Care is needed to avoid projecting responsibilities that could lead to overstated or misleading claims about the work.
rationale.RX.5: We must anchor the projection to the provided paragraph and the stated delegation, keeping responsibilities traceable.
